name: ComponentDefinitionTypeEnum
summary: The component definition type tells what kind of a component is in question.

enum_values.name: SYSTEM
enum_values.summary: With the type system, component is defined using developer-kit

enum_values.name: CUSTOM
enum_values.summary: With the type custom, component is defined as custom component

enum_values.name: DOTNET
enum_values.summary: With the type dotnet, component is defined using .NET plug-in interface

enum_values.name: DOTNET_CONNECTION
enum_values.summary: With the type dotnet_connection, connection is defined using .NET plug-in interface

enum_values.name: DOTNET_DRAWING
enum_values.summary: With the type dotnet_drawing, drawing component is defined using .NET drawing plug-in interface
